jumped another four points in February, which is fantastic to see.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content quality issues and define a new, more collaborative workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Quality Crisis:** Recent articles (e.g., "Customer Renewals") contain significant factual errors, misdefinitions, and off-brand messaging, indicating a critical breakdown in GrowthX's internal review process.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**New Workflow Pilot:** A pilot will test a new workflow where Zach provides a 5-minute voice note for one article, giving the AI pipeline expert context to improve accuracy and reduce review cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [**New Engagement Manager:** Carly (new EM) joins next week and will provide technical SEO recommendations (e.g., fixing the blog's "load more" function) to accelerate ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
  - [**Strong SEO Gains:** Despite quality issues, metrics are strong: Authority Score is up 4 points, organic clicks are up 126% WoW, and the site now ranks for over 60 keywords, with 12 in the top 20.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Breakdown

  - [The "Customer Renewals" article was the primary example of a critical quality failure, with issues including:](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [**Factual Errors:** Misdefining "churn" and misstating what data Turnstile stores.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
      - [**Awkward Transitions:** Lacking logical flow between paragraphs.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
      - [**Unsubstantiated Claims:** Asserting patterns are "predictable" without evidence.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [**Off-Brand Messaging:** Using "addiction" and "contractual lock-in" language.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
      - [**Irrelevant Information:** Including stats on SaaS pricing updates that don't support the point.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Similar issues were noted in other articles:](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [**"Payment Failures":** Article content focused on "collections" instead of the keyword's actual definition.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [**"Tiers":** Repeated the same problems as a previous draft, indicating feedback was not applied.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A breakdown in GrowthX's internal review process, where articles are supposed to be reviewed by a managing editor before client delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Proposed Workflow Solution

  - [**Goal:** Embed Turnstile's expert context into the AI writing process to improve accuracy and reduce the need for extensive post-draft reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Pilot Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
    1.  [Zach will select one topic from the Airtable list.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
    2.  [Zach will record a 5-minute voice note with expert context.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
    3.  [GrowthX engineers will integrate this note into the AI pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Zach's prior test with this method yielded a much higher-quality draft, proving its potential.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)

### New Engagement Manager & Technical SEO

  - [**New EM:** Carly joins next week; William will overlap for 2–3 meetings to ensure a smooth transition.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [**Carly's Expertise:** Strong technical SEO skills.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Initial Audit Findings:**](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=2097.0)
      - [**Problem:** The blog uses a "load more" button instead of pagination.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=2128.0)
      - [**Impact:** This hinders search engine crawlers, suppressing the ranking of older articles (e.g., "Quote to Cash").](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=2128.0)
      - [**Recommendation:** Implement pagination.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=2128.0)
  - [**Next Week:** Carly will present a full technical SEO analysis. Matt Ryder (Turnstile's Demand-Gen Manager) will be invited to attend.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)

### SEO Performance Update

  - [**Authority Score:** Up 4 points in February.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [**Organic Clicks:** Up 126% week-over-week.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)
  - [**Keyword Rankings:**](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
      - Now ranking for \>60 keywords (up from \<30).
      - [12 keywords are in the top 20.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
      - [Valuable keywords now ranking include "recurring invoice software" and "recurring revenue billing software" (difficulty 45).](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
      - [Address internal quality control issues with the managing editor.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
      - [Confirm with engineers that the AI pipeline can ingest Zach's voice notes and provide a timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
  - [**Zach:**](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
      - [Select a topic from Airtable for the pilot.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
      - [Record and send a 5-minute voice note on the topic "What is the impact of flexible billing frequencies on growth?" to William.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [**Seema:**](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=2097.0)
      - [Invite Matt Ryder to next week's meeting for the technical SEO presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/4z9ik9kbS-sNb1SLcspM9apxemxs-emC?tab=summary&timestamp=2097.0)

action_items.description: Meet Ife re: renewals/payment failures/tiers; pause payment failures; then update Zach/Seema
Send Zach/Seema context-ingestion plan; then integrate pipeline, send weekly topics, ingest recordings
Record 5-min context for 'flexible billing frequencies' and Slack to William
